name: Cornerstone Building Brands, Inc.
description: Cornerstone Building Brands, Inc. is the largest manufacturer of exterior building products for residential and low-rise non-residential buildings in North America. Headquartered in Cary, North Carolina, the company serves a diverse customer base across the commercial, residential, and repair and remodel markets. It offers an expansive product portfolio including vinyl siding, metal accessories, windows, doors, and metal wall and roof systems.
